limitations: Shopify inventory fields are reported only as hints, not stock truth; Tiny remains stock truth.
Tiny was not called live in this block to avoid API pressure; partial local snapshot remains the stock limitation.
Collections were capped to first 120 products from Admin GraphQL for safety; pagination can be added if needed.
Margin/cost is still not reliable enough for scoring.
